# Copilot instructions

Read [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) (repo root) in full before making any
suggestion or change in this repository. It is the single source of truth
for architecture, conventions, and known `neo-blessed` gotchas — this file
is only a pointer, not a separate or lighter rule set.

When a change touches an area `CLAUDE.md` documents (keybinds, panels, the
event bus, percentage-based layout math, etc.), update the matching section
in `CLAUDE.md` in the same change, per its own "Keeping this file in sync"
table.
